zh.lifeSummary: Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland是William Sutherland 2nd Earl of Sutherland的兒子，於1285年出生。他於大約1309年與Margaret Mar在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1333年7月19日享年48歲。

zh-hans.Golspie, Sutherland, Scotland: 苏格兰薩瑟蘭格爾斯皮
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland是William Sutherland 2nd Earl of Sutherland的儿子，于1285年出生。他于大约1309年与Margaret Mar在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1333年7月19日享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sutherland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Caithness): habitational name from the Scottish county of Sutherland, named with Old Norse súthr ‘south, southern’ + land ‘land’ because the territory lay south of Scandinavia and the Norse colonies in the Orkney and Shetland Islands.
History: This is the name of a Highland Scottish clan associated with the county of Sutherland.

nameMeanings.name: Kenneth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Scottish origin: Anglicized form of two different Gaelic names, Cinaed and Cainnech. The former was the Gaelic name of Kenneth mac Alpin ( d. 858 ), first king of the united Picts and Scots. The latter survives today in Scotland as the common Gaelic name Coinneach . Since early in the 20th century Kenneth has been in regular use and enjoyed great popularity as a given name well beyond the borders of Scotland.

variants.name: Kennith
meanings: Of Scottish origin: Anglicized form of two different Gaelic names, Cinaed and Cainnech. The former was the Gaelic name of Kenneth mac Alpin ( d. 858 ), first king of the united Picts and Scots. The latter survives today in Scotland as the common Gaelic name Coinneach . Since early in the 20th century Kenneth has been in regular use and enjoyed great popularity as a given name well beyond the borders of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland was born in 1285 as the son of William Sutherland 2nd Earl of Sutherland. He married Margaret Mar about 1309, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 19 July 1333, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland est né en 1285, fils de William Sutherland 2nd Earl of Sutherland. Il a épousé Margaret Mar environ 1309, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 19 juillet 1333, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland wurde 1285, als Sohn von William Sutherland 2nd Earl of Sutherland geboren. Er hat um 1309 in Scotland Margaret Mar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 19. Juli 1333 im Alter von 48 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland è nato il nel 1285 come figlio di William Sutherland 2nd Earl of Sutherland. Lui sposato Margaret Mar circa 1309, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 19 luglio 1333, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherlandは1285年にWilliam Sutherland 2nd Earl of Sutherlandの息子として生まれた。約1309年にスコットランドでMargaret Marと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1333年7月19日に48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland(은)는 1285년 William Sutherland 2nd Earl of Sutherland의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1309년 스컷랜드에서 Margaret Mar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1333년 7월 19일 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland nasceu em 1285 filho de William Sutherland 2nd Earl of Sutherland. Ele casou-se com Margaret Mar aproximadamente 1309, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 19 de julho de 1333, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland родился в 1285 г. Его отца звали William Sutherland 2nd Earl of Sutherland. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Mar около 1309 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 19 июля 1333 г. в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Kenneth Sutherland 4th Earl of Sutherland nació en 1285 como hijo de William Sutherland 2nd Earl of Sutherland. Se casó con Margaret Mar aproximadamente 1309, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 19 de julio de 1333, a la edad de 48 años.
